what: Typical time between price peaks/troughs per symbol, and the predicted next peak.
why: Mean-reversion is about timing the bounce. Knowing the usual gap between peaks lets us flag 'this is probably near the next bounce peak.'
action: Feeds the chart's prediction overlay. Measurement only during the 2.5.5 learning pause — it informs, it does not auto-trade.
note: Peaks = local maxima over a 5-sample window on ~10-12min cadence (~1h smoothing).
